subcodes.first_line: O my Lord! I am a sinner, and Thou art the Forgiver. I am intoxicated with the wine of heedlessness; bestow upon me awareness through Thy grace [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای پروردگار من گنه کارم و تو آمرزگار مدهوش از خمر غفلتم هوشی عنايت کن
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
